description:
The AngularVelocityRangeInitializer component makes particles have a random rotation speed within a range along their orientation axis when born.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.MinValue: The minimum angular velocity a particle can have when born.
fields.MaxValue: The maximum angular velocity a particle can have when born.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
